eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Honolulu, HI; at 12:16 AM ON MAR 21, 2026 Effective until 01:16 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: From Oahu Emergency Management: The remaining road of out Waialua at risk of failing in the event of more rain. Leave now while conditions are safe to prevent becoming stuck. Impacted area includes: All of Waialua west (Kaena side) of Kaukonahua Stream. Access INTO Waialua ends as of 9:30pm. Vehicles only allowed to EXIT after that. Evacuate now to avoid isolation.
